title: ilex subavenia
intro: Ilex subavenia is a species of plant in the family Aquifoliaceae, commonly known as the subaven holly, a type of evergreen shrub or small tree native to Asia. The leaves and berries of the Ilex subavenia plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex subavenia include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Ilex subavenia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as dried and used in capsule or powder form, for its medicinal and health benefits.
